{{CargoClone
|name=Lady Zhen
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=160
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: W-tads extracted +9
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: W-tads extracted +15
|}}
